name: @flyfish-group/file-viewer3
description: 基于 Vue 3 + TypeScript + Vite 的纯前端多格式文件预览组件

scripts.type-check:adapters: pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer-web type-check && pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer-react type-check && pnpm --filter file-viewer3 type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/web type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/react type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/react-legacy type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue3 type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue2.7 type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue2.6 type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/jquery type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/svelte type-check
scripts.build-lib-only: vite build --mode lib && node scripts/fix-lib-css.mjs && node scripts/fix-lib-workers.mjs && node scripts/copy-cad-wasm.mjs --dist-only
scripts.build:adapter-packages: pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer-web build && pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer-react build && pnpm --filter file-viewer3 build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/web build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/react build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/react-legacy build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue3 build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue2.7 build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue2.6 build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/jquery build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/svelte build
scripts.verify:migration-gates: pnpm type-check && pnpm build-only && pnpm docs:build && pnpm verify:smoke-matrix && pnpm verify:branch-roles && pnpm wrappers:verify --source-only && pnpm verify:wrapper-options && pnpm verify:compatibility-readmes && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && pnpm verify:ecosystem-tarballs && pnpm release:ecosystem:list
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: pnpm build-only && pnpm verify:demo-output && node scripts/deploy-cloudflare-pages.mjs
scripts.release:adapters:pack: pnpm release:ecosystem:build && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && node scripts/release-ecosystem-packages.mjs --pack --pack-dir .release/adapters
scripts.release:adapters:publish: pnpm release:ecosystem:build && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && node scripts/release-ecosystem-packages.mjs --publish
scripts.release:ecosystem:build: pnpm --filter @file-viewer/core build && pnpm build:viewer-assets && pnpm build:adapter-packages && pnpm build-lib-only && pnpm obfuscate && pnpm wrappers:export && pnpm verify:production-entrypoints
scripts.release:ecosystem:pack: pnpm release:ecosystem:build && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && node scripts/release-ecosystem-packages.mjs --pack --clean
scripts.release:ecosystem:publish:dry-run: pnpm release:ecosystem:build && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && node scripts/release-ecosystem-packages.mjs --publish --dry-run
scripts.release:ecosystem:publish: pnpm release:ecosystem:build && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && node scripts/release-ecosystem-packages.mjs --publish
scripts.wrappers:export: pnpm wrappers:readme && node scripts/sync-wrapper-repos.mjs && pnpm wrappers:verify
scripts.wrappers:standalone-smoke: pnpm --filter @file-viewer/core build && pnpm build:adapter-packages && pnpm wrappers:export && node scripts/verify-wrapper-standalone-builds.mjs
scripts.release:pack: pnpm type-check && pnpm build-lib-only && pnpm obfuscate && npm pack
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm type-check && pnpm build-lib-only && node scripts/verify-package-output.mjs
